Who: Platform Pilot RACI

- Owner: diegobohman — announce the pilot in Issue #1, post the pre-read template, chase Unit Leads for submissions, convene the 15-minute debrief and publish the final recommendation.
- Facilitator: agreed Unit Lead (rotating) — run the meeting using the per-item protocol (Pre-listen → Co-sense → Co-create → Re-sense), enforce timeboxes, and ensure actions are captured with owners and due dates.
- Data lead: volunteer (or Owner) — consolidate all 2-line pre-reads into a single pre-read (publish as `meetings/platform-health-check-YYYYMMDD-pre-read.md` the day before), run the 2-question pulse within 24h after the meeting, and collect metrics.
- Participants: Platform Unit Leads + invited stakeholders — submit a 2-line pre-read for your Unit by 2026-04-26; come prepared to (a) quickly co-sense in the meeting (30s signal) and (b) co-create one short, testable action when requested.
- Notes capture: scribe (assigned by Facilitator) — create `meetings/platform-health-check-YYYYMMDD-notes.md`, record actions with owners, and attach the consolidated pre-read.

Do (step-by-step)

1. By 2026-04-24 — Owner posts this plan and attaches the pre-read template to Issue #1. (Owner)
2. By 2026-04-26 — Participants submit 2-line pre-reads as issue comments or PRs to the `meetings/` folder. (Participants)
3. Day before meeting — Data lead publishes the consolidated pre-read file in `meetings/` and links it in Issue #1. (Data lead)
4. During the meeting — Facilitator runs each agenda item using the per-item protocol: Pre-listen (60–120s) → Co-sense (60–90s) → Co-create (8–12m) → Re-sense (60–90s). Scribe records actions and owners. (Facilitator, Scribe)
5. Within 24h post-meeting — Data lead sends the 2-question pulse and posts pulse results in Issue #1. (Data lead)
6. By 2026-05-04 — Owner publishes a one-paragraph recommendation, consolidated metrics, and the short debrief notes in Issue #1. (Owner)

Timebox

- Pilot week: 2026-04-27 → 2026-05-03

Report back

- Consolidated pre-read: publish before the meeting (day before).
- Pulse results and actions: post within 24h after the meeting.
- One-paragraph recommendation and learnings: post by 2026-05-04.

Notes & small operational tips

- Use one-word signals during co-sense to keep the rhythm tight.
- If new data appears that needs investigation, capture it as an action rather than extending the discussion.
- If an agenda item requires >15m, table it and schedule a focused follow-up with the relevant participants.

(You can paste this whole comment into Issue #1 to run the pilot.)
